# HelloWood

> A Chinese-language technical blog about HomeLab operations, Java, Spring Boot, gRPC, containers, Kubernetes, OpenWrt, Proxmox VE, and related infrastructure.

The site is a public, read-only blog. It does not expose an application API, an OAuth-protected resource, or an MCP server.

## Discovery

- [Machine-readable post index](https://blog.hellowood.dev/index.json): Titles, summaries, tags, dates, and canonical article URLs.
- [Sitemap](https://blog.hellowood.dev/sitemap.xml): All public pages.
- [RSS feed](https://blog.hellowood.dev/index.xml): Recently published and updated articles.
- [Blog research skill](https://blog.hellowood.dev/.well-known/agent-skills/research-hellowood-blog/SKILL.md): Instructions for finding and reading relevant articles.

## Usage

Search `index.json` before fetching individual articles. Prefer `Accept: text/markdown` when the response supports Markdown content negotiation; otherwise use the canonical HTML page.
